steps.title: Identify the time before the acorn fell
steps.content: Before the acorn fell from the tree refers to the initial moment, when no time has elapsed. This corresponds to $x = 0$ seconds. We need to find $f(0)$.

steps.title: Evaluate the function at x = 0
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 0$ into $f(x) = -16x^2 + 76$:
$$f(0) = -16(0)^2 + 76 = 0 + 76 = 76$$
The estimated height of the acorn before it fell from the tree is 76 feet.
